def positive_flask_json_encoder_per_request():
    rule_id = "flask_json_encoder_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flask views instantiate JSON encoders per request instead of reusing app-level serialization setup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
